response.global_analysis: Phonetically matches the identified songs 'Break The World' and 'Sakuranbo Kids'. Discarded null reference JSON lyrics and relied on audio and on-screen text. Intermission dialogue transcribed and translated based on scene context. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio activation, and segments are split where audio pauses occur to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original: Light and dark 見つめている
subtitles.english: Staring at the light and dark

subtitles.original: 果てなく続く狂ったWorld 突き進む
subtitles.english: Pushing through the endless, crazy world

subtitles.original: 強い意志で限界を打ち破って
subtitles.english: Breaking through the limits with a strong will

subtitles.original: Summon Ride!
subtitles.english: Summon Ride!

subtitles.original: 時は満ちて
subtitles.english: The time is ripe

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 意志を宿し
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Harboring the will

subtitles.original: 願いを一つに集め
subtitles.english: Gathering our wishes into one

subtitles.original: 全てを越えて突き抜けろ
subtitles.english: Cross over everything and break through

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 空を戦う
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Fighting in the sky

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 此処に舞い
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Dance here

subtitles.original: 約束の地へ駆け抜けろ
subtitles.english: Run through to the promised land

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 時を越えて
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Across time

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 祈り届け
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! May our prayers reach

subtitles.original: 想いを絆に変えて
subtitles.english: Changing our feelings into bonds

subtitles.original: 一点突破突き抜けろ
subtitles.english: Break through at a single point

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 次元を越え
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Across dimensions

subtitles.original: Summon Ride! 全ては今
subtitles.english: Summon Ride! Everything is now

subtitles.original: 約束の地へ駆け抜けろ
subtitles.english: Run through to the promised land

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、聴いてくれてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, thank you for listening!

subtitles.original: 今、何をやってるかと言うと、とってもこの後可愛いゲストが来るので
subtitles.english: Right now, what I'm doing is... because some very cute guests are coming next,

subtitles.original: フェロモンを出し捲っていました。はぁ...なんかドキドキするな。
subtitles.english: I was letting out a lot of pheromones. Hah... I'm getting nervous.

subtitles.original: それでは、呼びたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Well then, I'd like to call them!

subtitles.original: 本日のスペシャルゲスト、おいで～！
subtitles.english: Today's special guests, come on out~!

subtitles.original: おっはよー！
subtitles.english: Good morning!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: パトラ様ー！
subtitles.english: Patra-sama!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！バウバウ！にゃ、フワモコちゃんの二人に来てもらいました！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Bau bau! Meow, I've invited Fuwamoco!

subtitles.original: じゃ、自己紹介お願いします。
subtitles.english: Well, please introduce yourselves.

subtitles.original: はい！チワワじゃないよ、フワワだよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Not a chihuahua, I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: フワワじゃないよ、モココだよ！
subtitles.english: Not Fuwawa, I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: Hololive English -Advent- の魔界の番犬シスターズ！
subtitles.english: The demon guard dog sisters from Hololive English -Advent-!

subtitles.original: 二人合わせて、フワモコです！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Together, we are Fuwamoco! Bau bau!

subtitles.original: はは！バウバウ様、はは！ありがたいです。
subtitles.english: Haha! Bau bau-sama, haha! I'm grateful.

subtitles.original: いや、フワモコちゃんはパトラがね、ASMRの音をね、プロデュースして
subtitles.english: You know, for Fuwamoco, Patra produced their ASMR sounds,

subtitles.original: ね、その時濃厚な時間を過ごさせていただいたんだよね。
subtitles.english: and we had a very intense time together then, didn't we?

subtitles.original: 楽しかった！楽しかった！
subtitles.english: It was fun! It was fun!

subtitles.original: 二人のASMRボイス販売中なので、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Their ASMR voices are currently on sale, so check them out!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！ちょっと恥ずかしい...ちょっと恥ずかしい...
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! It's a bit embarrassing... a bit embarrassing...

subtitles.original: でも今日はパトラの誕生日だから、何か二人からご褒美がもらえるって聞いたんだけど？
subtitles.english: But today is Patra's birthday, so I heard I'd get a reward?

subtitles.original: パトラ様のご褒美？
subtitles.english: A reward for Patra-sama?

subtitles.original: うん。フワモコは聞いてないです！
subtitles.english: Yeah. Fuwamoco hasn't heard about this!

subtitles.original: そんなそんな...ほら、せっかくの誕生日だしね。
subtitles.english: Oh come on... hey, it's a special birthday.

subtitles.original: いや、ご褒美どうしようか？モココちゃん？
subtitles.english: Well, what should the reward be? Mococo-chan?

subtitles.original: ハフハグ...
subtitles.english: Sniff, hug...

subtitles.original: ハグちゃん...ハフハフ...
subtitles.english: Hagu-chan... sniff sniff...

subtitles.original: はい、もうどこでも触ってください、ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Okay, you can touch me anywhere, thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 角外す。じゃ、せーの！
subtitles.english: Taking off my horns. Okay, one-two!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデー！ハッピーバウバウ！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday! Happy Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: 幸せ...フワワの方がなんかムニムニして...
subtitles.english: So happy... Fuwawa feels more squishy...

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って待って...モココちゃん...
subtitles.english: Ah, wait wait... Mococo-chan...

subtitles.original: モココちゃん、妹なんだから、は～可愛い可愛い...
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan is the younger sister, so... ah~ so cute...

subtitles.original: 可愛い...プルプルプル...頑張ってる可愛い...
subtitles.english: Cute... squish squish... trying hard, so cute...

subtitles.original: ご褒美だ。今日はね、三人でまたね、歌が歌えると！
subtitles.english: It's a reward. Today, the three of us get to sing again!

subtitles.original: イヤー！やった～！
subtitles.english: Yay! Yay~!

subtitles.original: あ、じゃちょっとパトラ露出が激しいので着ますね。ホイ！
subtitles.english: Ah, Patra's outfit is a bit too revealing, so I'll change. Swish!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！じゃ、早速行きますよ！ホイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Well, let's get right to it! Hoi!

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください、さくらんぼキッズ！
subtitles.english: Then please listen to Sakuranbo Kids!

subtitles.original: ぴっ！あれれ、おかしなこのドキドキは
subtitles.english: Pii! Oh my, how strange this heartbeat is...

subtitles.original: 君の腕の中で溢れ出す
subtitles.english: Overflowing in your arms...

subtitles.original: ポロリ零れた涙さくらんぼ
subtitles.english: Cherries, tears that spilled out...

subtitles.original: もっとギュっとしていてね
subtitles.english: Keep me held tight...

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love love love love

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love love love love

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love love love love

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love love love love

subtitles.original: まだまだかな君のハート
subtitles.english: Is your heart still not ready?

subtitles.original: ちょっと酸っぱい？本当？
subtitles.english: A bit sour? Really?

subtitles.original: おやおやおや待ちきれない
subtitles.english: Oh my, oh my, I can't wait...

subtitles.original: このままじゃ...ね、待って！
subtitles.english: If it stays like this... Hey, wait!

subtitles.original: 澄まして顔で決めて...ね、待って！
subtitles.english: Decide with a cool face... Hey, wait!
